categories.title: AI Solution Categories
categories.subtitle: We develop solutions based on the main demands of the Brazilian corporate AI market

vendas.name: Sales Automation
vendas.description: Virtual SDRs and automated lead qualification
vendas.detailedDescription: Transform your sales process with AI agents that work 24/7. Our virtual SDRs qualify leads, make intelligent follow-ups, integrate with CRM and automatically schedule meetings. Increase your conversion rate by up to 300% with intelligent prospecting.

atendimento.name: Intelligent Support
atendimento.detailedDescription: Revolutionize customer service with advanced conversational AI. Chatbots that understand context, solve complex problems and learn continuously. Multi-channel support (WhatsApp, web, phone) with processing optimized for Brazilian Portuguese.

rh.name: Intelligent HR
rh.detailedDescription: Enhance your HR with predictive AI. Automate recruitment, perform intelligent candidate screening, predict turnover and optimize engagement. Advanced analytics for strategic people decisions based on real data.

analytics.name: BI & Analytics
analytics.detailedDescription: Transform data into actionable insights with advanced AI. Predictive analytics, real-time processing, anomaly detection and intelligent forecasting. Dynamic dashboards that reveal hidden opportunities in your business.

processos.name: Process Automation
processos.detailedDescription: Automate complex processes by combining traditional RPA with cognitive AI. Document processing, administrative workflows, intelligent approvals and 24/7 operations. Reduce operational costs by up to 60% with intelligent automation.

voz.name: Voice & Language
voz.detailedDescription: Master voice communication with AI specialized in Portuguese. Conversational interfaces, intelligent transcription, sentiment analysis and automatic routing. Technology 100% optimized for Brazilian accents and expressions.
